info.title: Central Dogma API
info.description: LINE Central Dogma is a highly-available version-controlled service configuration repository. This REST API provides programmatic access to manage projects, repositories, files, commits, mirrors, credentials, app identities, variables, server status, and access control.

post.summary: Revert repository to a target revision
